content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To: Natalie West

Date: February 17, 1978

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Ted Prim

Subject: Independent Expenditures

With respect to your question on independent expenditures, I think the attached memo indicates that we have answered that question previously. For that reason, I don't think we should change our position at this time. I will be in the Conflict of Interest Committee meeting on Tuesday and therefore will not be able to attend the opinion request meeting. Therefore, I would request that any discussion, if any, be deferred until the following week.

With respect to the mobile home letter, Dwight has spoken with them previously. He will plan to respond to the letter unless I hear from you.

TP:gb
attachment

2/27/78
Expenditures are not subject to the lobbyist contribution prohibition pending the outcome of the UPA case
